purpose: Separate hard replay-grounded adventure acceptance from exploration and interest diagnostics.

hard_verifiers.contract: Task, trace, episode, and environment identities and typed fields agree.
Canonical hashes, source provenance, event IDs, and causal graph are intact.
Every claimed action matches an allowed environment action receipt at the same tick and position.
Observations are not from the future; outcomes descend from actions; claim evidence exists by claim time.
Every location is in bounds and every movement obeys the declared topology and step cap.
Submitted costs equal task costs, resources never go negative, and final balances re-derive exactly.
Every declared event, visit, or claim-count goal is re-derived from the environment and trace.
Every atomic fact, count, or visit claim is exactly derivable from its cited evidence.

acceptance_rule: All task-declared hard verifiers must pass. Diagnostic outputs cannot appear in required_verifiers and never contribute to acceptance.
claim_boundary: Passing verifies the declared trace contract against supplied replay-grounded events. It is not a measure of fun, intelligence, narrative quality, or universal exploit resistance.
